page_content:
THET380 Sound Design (3 Credits)

Theatre Sound Design is a first course in designing sound for stage productions.

Prerequisite: THET116 and TDPS201; or permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

Restriction: Sophomore standing or higher.

THET383 Costume Design | (3 Credits)

Basic principles of theatre costume design and introduction to rendering skills. Emphasis on development of design conception, unity, character statement, basic clothing design and period style adaptation. Prerequisite: TDPS201, THET116, THET222, and THET223.
